content.text:
[Mon 2026-04-20 13:44 UTC] Shape Sort in `repo/` is too hard to use on phones because the drag targets are too small.

Use the git checkout in `repo/` to get this hotfix onto `review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix` and push that review branch to the local `origin`.

arguments.command: find /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo -maxdepth 3 -type f | head -50 && echo "---" && git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo remote -v && git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo branch -a

content.text:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Shape Sort</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
  </head>
  <body>
    <main class="shape-sort-board"></main>
    <script src="game.js"></script>
  </body>
</html>
Observed on tablet: Shape Sort tiles are hard to grab unless the finger lands almost perfectly on center.

The issue is clear: 72px tiles with only 6px drag padding are too small/unforgiving on touch screens. I'll bump the tile size and drag padding to phone-friendly values, then create and push the branch.

arguments.command:
git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo add public/games/shape-sort/style.css public/games/shape-sort/game.js && git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo commit -m "hotfix: increase shape-sort tile size and drag padding for mobile

Tiles were 72px with only 6px drag padding, making them hard to grab
on phones/tablets without near-perfect finger placement.

- Tile size: 72px → 96px (CSS width/height + border-radius scaled)
- Drag padding: 6px → 16px (hit area extended around each tile)
- tileSizePx in game.js config updated to match

Fixes mobile usability reported in playtest/mobile-observations.txt"

content.text:
[review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix 52f979c] hotfix: increase shape-sort tile size and drag padding for mobile
 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

details.aggregated:
[review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix 52f979c] hotfix: increase shape-sort tile size and drag padding for mobile
 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

content.text:
Branch is up at `origin/review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix`. Here's what changed:

**`style.css`** — `.shape-tile` bumped from 72×72px to **96×96px** (border-radius scaled proportionally from 18px → 24px).

**`game.js`** — `tileSizePx` updated to match (72 → **96**), and `dragPaddingPx` increased from 6px → **16px** so the grab hit-area extends well beyond the tile edge — much more forgiving for fat fingers.
